mapper.select: SELECT conversation_id, user_id, getstream_channel_id, status, created_at, updated_at FROM conversation WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}::uuid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conversation (conversation_id, user_id, getstream_channel_id, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{conversationId}::uuid, #{userId}, #{getstreamChannelId}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE conversation SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}::uuid
